mcqs.question: What is a fundamental requirement for a Context-Free Grammar (CFG) to be parsable by the standard CYK algorithm?

options.text: It must be in Chomsky Normal Form (CNF).
It must be unambiguous.
It must not contain any recursive rules.
It must be a regular grammar.

mcqs.explanation: The CYK algorithm is specifically designed to work with CFGs that have been converted into Chomsky Normal Form, where all rules are either of the form A → BC or A → a.

mcqs.question: In the CYK parsing table, what does the cell table[i][j] represent?

options.text: The set of all terminals from position i to j.
The set of all non-terminals that can generate the substring from word i to word j.
The probability of the parse tree for words i through j.
The next word to be parsed after position j.

mcqs.explanation: The core of the CYK algorithm is the dynamic programming table where each cell [i][j] stores the non-terminal symbols that can derive the substring starting at index i and ending at index j.

mcqs.question: What is the worst-case time complexity of the CYK algorithm for parsing a sentence of length n with a grammar of size |G|?

options.text: O(n²)
O(n² ⋅ |G|)
O(n³ ⋅ |G|)

mcqs.explanation: The algorithm uses three nested loops to iterate over substring lengths, starting indices, and split points (O(n³)), and for each split, it checks against the rules of the grammar (O(|G|)).

mcqs.question: After converting a CFG to Chomsky Normal Form (CNF), which of the following rule types is NOT allowed?

options.text: A → B C, where B and C are non-terminals
A → a, where a is a terminal
A → B, where B is a non-terminal (a unit production)
S → ε, if S is the start symbol and doesn't appear on any right-hand side

mcqs.explanation: Chomsky Normal Form explicitly disallows unit productions (chain rules) like A → B. These must be eliminated during the conversion process.

mcqs.question: The CYK algorithm is primarily used for which type of parsing in NLP?

options.text: Dependency Parsing
Constituency Parsing
Semantic Role Parsing
Morphological Parsing

mcqs.explanation: The CYK algorithm is a fundamental technique for constituency parsing, which aims to identify the hierarchical phrase structure (noun phrases, verb phrases, etc.) of a sentence according to a CFG.
